notes:
### v1.3.1

#### Dashboard logic
- Added clickable dashboard stat popovers for raids, dailies, weeklies, calendar events, Argeos, and gold earners.
- Raid popovers now separate planned gold raid progress from additional tracked non-gold raid progress.
- Daily popovers now count completed tracked lazy/rested tasks correctly for the current reset while only focusing currently available unfinished dailies.
- Calendar event handling now supports compact Chaos Gate / Field Boss state views and the shorter 17-hour event availability window.
- Argeos event progress now resolves roster-wide tracking and completion state correctly.

#### Gold calculation
- Added positive mismatch handling for raids planned as Normal but cleared as Hard.
- Weekly gold progress now tracks planned cleared gold separately from actual earned gold, so bonus mismatch gold no longer makes the bar look complete while planned gold is still open.
- Added separate dashboard gold tokens for planned progress, bonus progress, missing gold, labels, and character-card border states.

#### Assets and UI polish
- Migrated app images, class icons, market icons, and feature icons from static images into bundled src assets.
- Updated the welcome/auth screen to use the current app icon and a draggable custom title area.
- Tightened dashboard stat popovers to avoid unnecessary scrollbars and restored missing calendar/task icons.
- Continued theme token separation so feature-specific colors can be tuned per theme without changing unrelated UI areas.

#### Backend and roster data
- Improved roster/entity synchronization paths so incoming encounter-derived item level and combat power data do not overwrite better existing values with lower values.
- Added cleanup around dashboard and task aggregation helpers to keep raid, daily, weekly, roster-wide, and gold calculations easier to maintain.

## Installation
Download `LOA.Tracker_1.3.1_x64-setup.exe` from the v1.3.1 release once the signed artifact is published.
